parsed.production_notes: The core footage is human-recorded, featuring a real hand interacting with an iPad using an Apple Pencil. However, the images displayed on the iPad screen appear to be a mix of standard stock photography and potentially AI-generated images, given the slightly unnatural smoothing on some faces like the man in the red suit.

characters.appearance: Only a right hand is visible throughout the video. The hand has a medium-dark complexion and short, neatly trimmed fingernails. It holds a white digital stylus (Apple Pencil).
characters.demeanor: Instructional and energetic, using the stylus to point, circle, and cross out elements on the screen to emphasize the spoken points.

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying illustrations, bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a tablet screen displaying illustrations on a plain white background. On the left is a drawing of a grey elephant with tusks, facing forward. On the right is a drawing of a green frog sitting down. Character A's hand, holding a white stylus, enters the frame from the bottom right. The stylus is used to draw red lines across the screen, crossing out the illustrations.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a tablet screen with illustrations of an elephant and a frog, along with the letters E and F. A hand holding a stylus draws red lines crossing out the letters and the elephant, suggesting a rejection of traditional, basic learning methods.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: आज तक इंग्लिश में ढंग से [Till today in English properly]

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying stock photos of office and group settings.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two men are seated in an office environment, engaged in a serious conversation. The man on the left wears a dark suit, and the man on the right wears a light blue button-down shirt and is gesturing with his hands. The background is a blurred office setting. Character A's hand with a stylus draws red lines over the image.

Three people, two men and one woman, stand together looking directly at the camera. They are smiling broadly and pointing their fingers forward in a mocking manner. The man on the left is in a blue shirt, the woman in the center in a red top, and the man on the right in a dark shirt. Character A's hand with a stylus draws a red circle around them.

scenes.visual_description: The tablet screen is split horizontally. The top half shows a stock photo of two men having a serious discussion in an office. The bottom half shows a stock photo of three people pointing and laughing at the camera. A hand with a stylus draws red marks over both photos, emphasizing the negative social consequences of poor English.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: एक सेंटेंस तक नहीं बोल पाते हो? ऐसे तो तुम्हारी कोई इज्जत नहीं करेगा। [you can't even speak one sentence? Like this, no one will respect you.]

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying an app store interface.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a tablet screen. Character A's hand, holding a white stylus, is visible in the foreground, interacting with the screen. The hand draws red circular and linear marks on the screen surface. The background of the screen is predominantly white with some blue elements, typical of a digital interface.

scenes.visual_description: The tablet screen displays an App Store page for the 'English Seekho' app. A hand with a stylus circles the app name and underlines the 'Open' button, directing the viewer's attention to the solution.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: इससे अच्छा तुम आज के आज इस ऐप पे रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट इंग्लिश की प्रैक्टिस करके देखो। [Better than this, starting today, try practicing English on this app for just 15 minutes daily.]

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying graphics and a photo of a speaker.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man stands on a stage, holding a microphone and speaking. He wears a bright red suit jacket over a white shirt with a black bowtie. His hair is styled neatly, and he has a confident expression. The background is slightly blurred, suggesting a public speaking event. Character A's hand with a stylus draws a red circle around the man.

scenes.visual_description: The screen briefly shows a graphic of a 15-minute clock and English learning icons, then cuts to a photo of a confident man in a red suit speaking into a microphone. The hand with the stylus circles the man, illustrating the end goal of fluent speaking.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: फिर देखना कैसे फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलते हो। [Then see how fluently you speak English.]

The screen displays a digital interface with a dark background and various colorful icons and portrait photos. The hand draws red marks on the screen.

scenes.visual_description: The tablet screen shows the App Store page briefly before transitioning to the 'English Seekho' app's 'Basic Level' course list. The hand uses the stylus to circle the app name and point out the ad-free learning environment.

The screen displays a large banner featuring a portrait of a smiling young woman holding a green book. Below the banner is a list of items with small portrait photos. The hand draws red circles and lines on the screen.

scenes.visual_description: The screen navigates to the 'Spoken English' section of the app. It highlights a banner with a smiling woman, then scrolls through a list of video episodes featuring different expert instructors. The hand circles the show title and underlines episode names.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप पे स्पोकन इंग्लिश यानी बोलने वाली अंग्रेजी का एक शो आता है। एक्सपर्ट्स छोटे-छोटे वीडियोस में स्टेप-बाय-स्टेप इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं। [On English Seekho app, there is a show for Spoken English, meaning spoken English. Experts teach how to speak English step-by-step in short videos.]

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying a photo of students and app interfaces.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two young men are sitting at a table in a brightly lit room, looking at a smartphone held by the man on the right. The man on the left wears a light grey shirt, and the man on the right wears a light blue patterned shirt. Open books are on the table in front of them. Character A's hand with a stylus draws a red circle around the two men.

scenes.visual_description: The screen shows a 15-minute clock graphic, then a photo of two boys studying together with a phone. It then quickly flashes through the app's course list and an AI chat interface. The hand with the stylus circles the boys and underlines text in the chat, emphasizing the daily practice routine.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: तो बस रोज़ का 15 मिनट निकालो, एक्सपर्ट के वीडियोस देखो, एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करो। ट्रायल सिर्फ एक रुपये का है। [So just take out 15 minutes daily, watch expert's videos, practice with AI coach. Trial is for just one rupee.]

YES / NO Ka Sahi Use

Good manners ke English
English AI
Online
Achha idea hai! Grammar se basics strong hote hain. English mein tenses bahut important hain, jaise ki 'Present Tense', 'Past Tense', aur 'Future Tense'.
Hum Present Tense se shuru kar sakte hain, jo hum daily life mein use karte hain. Kya aapko Present Simple Tense seekhna pasand hoga?
8:40 PM
Present Tense se shuru karte hain
8:41 PM
Great choice! Present Simple Tense hum tab use karte hain jab hum apni daily habits, routines, ya aisi baatein batate hain jo sach hain. Jaise "I eat breakfast every morning." (Main har subah nashta karta/karti hoon). Ismein verb ki first form use hoti hai.
Chaliye, aapki turn! Aap apni koi ek daily habit English mein batane ki koshish kijiye.
Ek aur example do
Mujhe 'I play' se sentence banana hai

scenes.setting: Tablet screen displaying stock photos of a speaker and an audience.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man in a bright red suit jacket and black bowtie is speaking into a microphone. He appears confident and is looking off-camera to the left. The background is blurred. Character A's hand with a stylus draws a red line across the image.

A group of four people, two men and two women, are sitting in a row, looking upwards and to the left with expressions of awe and amazement. They appear to be an audience watching a performance. They are dressed in casual and semi-formal attire. The background features wooden window blinds. Character A's hand with a stylus draws a red circle around the group.

scenes.visual_description: The tablet screen is split horizontally again. The top shows the confident man in the red suit speaking. The bottom shows an audience of four people looking up in amazement. The hand with the stylus draws red marks on both photos, connecting the fluent speaker with the impressed audience.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: फिर देखना कुछ दिनों में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश देख के लोग दंग रह जाएंगे। [Then see, in a few days people will be stunned seeing your English.]

scenes.setting: Digital end card with a phone mockup.

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically against a plain white background. The phone screen is dark. Below the phone is a bright green rectangular button. The composition is clean and minimal.

scenes.visual_description: The video transitions to a digital end card. It features a mockup of a smartphone displaying the 'English Seekho' app logo, with a prominent green 'INSTALL NOW' button below it. The video ends with a black screen displaying a long legal disclaimer in white text.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download English Seekho app.]
